name: Trajectory Clearance Audit
description: As a robotics automation engineer, audit a workcell design in CoppeliaSim to ensure minimum clearance between a UR5 robot arm (/opt/CoppeliaSim/models/robots/non-mobile/UR5.ttm) and at least two static obstacles within its workspace. Perform a 50-step joint-space trajectory sweep of the base joint from -90 to +90 degrees, calculating the absolute minimum geometric distance at each step. Export the clearance data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/clearance_audit.csv (columns: step_id, j0_rad, min_clearance_m) and a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/audit_summary.json (fields: total_steps, obstacles_evaluated, absolute_min_clearance_m, critical_step_id, clearance_violation). Save the final scene to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/audit_scene.ttt. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
